---
id: handle-get-public-settings
title: "Get public settings"
description: "Returns non-sensitive public settings needed by the frontend, including founder pricing status, active discount amounts for each plan tier, and minimum short code lengths"

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/settings/public"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns non-sensitive public settings needed by the frontend, including founder pricing status, active discount amounts for each plan tier, and minimum short code lengths
